name: Rate Limiter (Token Bucket + Sliding Window)
description: Implement a rate limiting library with two strategies across two modules. Module limiter_types.py must define: LimitResult dataclass with fields allowed (bool), remaining (int), retry_after (float, seconds until next token, 0.0 if allowed); RateLimiter abstract base class with abstract methods allow(key: str) -> LimitResult and reset(key: str) -> None. Module limiters.py must import from limiter_types.py and implement: TokenBucketLimiter(capacity: int, refill_rate: float) where refill_rate is tokens per second, refilled continuously based on time elapsed; SlidingWindowLimiter(max_requests: int, window_seconds: float) which tracks request timestamps per key and counts those within the last window_seconds. Both classes must store independent state per key. Use time.monotonic() as time source.
tests:
def test_token_bucket_allows_initial():
    lim = TokenBucketLimiter(capacity=3, refill_rate=1.0)
    r = lim.allow('user1')
    assert r.allowed is True
    assert r.remaining == 2

def test_token_bucket_exhausts():
    lim = TokenBucketLimiter(capacity=2, refill_rate=1.0)
    lim.allow('u')
    lim.allow('u')
    r = lim.allow('u')
    assert r.allowed is False
    assert r.retry_after > 0

def test_token_bucket_refills():
    import time
    lim = TokenBucketLimiter(capacity=2, refill_rate=10.0)
    lim.allow('u')
    lim.allow('u')
    assert lim.allow('u').allowed is False
    time.sleep(0.15)
    assert lim.allow('u').allowed is True

def test_token_bucket_isolated_keys():
    lim = TokenBucketLimiter(capacity=1, refill_rate=1.0)
    assert lim.allow('a').allowed is True
    assert lim.allow('a').allowed is False
    assert lim.allow('b').allowed is True

def test_token_bucket_reset():
    lim = TokenBucketLimiter(capacity=1, refill_rate=0.1)
    lim.allow('u')
    assert lim.allow('u').allowed is False
    lim.reset('u')
    assert lim.allow('u').allowed is True

def test_sliding_window_allows_initial():
    lim = SlidingWindowLimiter(max_requests=3, window_seconds=1.0)
    r = lim.allow('u')
    assert r.allowed is True
    assert r.remaining == 2

def test_sliding_window_blocks_excess():
    lim = SlidingWindowLimiter(max_requests=2, window_seconds=1.0)
    lim.allow('u')
    lim.allow('u')
    r = lim.allow('u')
    assert r.allowed is False

def test_sliding_window_recovers():
    import time
    lim = SlidingWindowLimiter(max_requests=2, window_seconds=0.1)
    lim.allow('u')
    lim.allow('u')
    assert lim.allow('u').allowed is False
    time.sleep(0.15)
    assert lim.allow('u').allowed is True

def test_sliding_window_reset():
    lim = SlidingWindowLimiter(max_requests=1, window_seconds=10.0)
    lim.allow('u')
    lim.reset('u')
    assert lim.allow('u').allowed is True
constraints: Token bucket starts full and refills continuously
Sliding window must purge timestamps older than window_seconds
State per key is isolated; reset() only affects given key
